---
title: "Common Critical Care Pharmacology"
category: "Neurocritical Care"
section_id: "cc-pharmacology"
last_updated: "2026-07-01"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

# Common Critical Care Pharmacology

**Common Critical Care Pharmacy**

Fluids



**Common Agents Affecting Neurologic Exam**
